posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday community,

We are hosting a full day in-person meetup in Hilversum, the Netherlands on Wednesday October 8.

What you will get
• Practical sessions for Work Management Enterprise, monday Dev, CRM, Service, Make, and monday AI
• One to one consults with our solution experts to review your workflows
• Optional AI hackathon with pizza after the program

Agenda highlights
• Morning tracks: Enterprise Work Management or monday Dev
• Afternoon tracks: monday CRM or monday Service
• Late afternoon tracks: Make deep dive or monday AI use cases

Logistics
• Location: Xebia office, Hilversum, the Netherlands
• Doors open 09:30. Program 10:00 to 16:15 (19:30 if you’re joining the hackathon).
• Lunch, drinks and pizza included

Register here

events.xebia.com

Back to School Event in Hilversum

Join Xebia's Back to School Event - a full day to explore what’s new in monday.com, join product deep dives, and connect with other monday.com users.

Seats are limited so save your seat quick!
